contacts.name: Town of Marblehead – Department of Public Works

events.summary: The Town of Marblehead DPW is soliciting open-market bids for the supply of bituminous concrete (UNSPSC 30-12-16 Asphalts). Bids close June 23, 2026 at 10:00 AM; solicitation documents are available on CommBuys under bid number BD-26-1293-MAR14-MAR14-130407.

stories.name: Broughton Road Multi-Family Development – Winn Development Pre-Application

events.summary: Winn Development has filed a Pre-Application proposing a residential multi-family development on Broughton Road on land associated with the Marblehead Housing Authority; the Planning Board will conduct an initial review and discussion on June 15, 2026. No unit count, density, or program details are provided in the agenda.

contacts.name: Town of Marblehead – Department of Public Works

events.summary: The Town of Marblehead (Harbor's & Water department) filed an Emergency Certificate request to complete temporary repairs to the damaged Stramski's Pier. This is a public-owned coastal structure seeking expedited Conservation Commission authorization.

brief.what: Maple Circle Marblehead LLC seeks a Special Permit or Variance from the Zoning Board of Appeals to subdivide 9 Maple Circle in Marblehead's Single Residence District into two lots: Lot 1 retains the existing dwelling with substandard front and side yard setbacks, and Lot 2 would receive a new single-family dwelling with substandard frontage and lot width.
brief.status: The application has been continued twice — from January 27 to March 24, then to May 26, 2026 — with no evidence taken at either hearing.
brief.whats_next: No next step or hearing date is stated in the record.
brief.outlook: Three continuances with no evidence taken suggests the applicant or board is not yet ready to proceed on the merits; momentum appears slow, and further continuances are plausible before substantive review begins.

events.summary: Maple Circle Marblehead LLC seeks a special permit or variance to divide 9 Maple Circle into two building lots in the Single Residence District: Lot 1 retains the existing dwelling (substandard front and side yard setbacks) and Lot 2 would receive a new single-family dwelling (substandard frontage and lot width). The matter was continued from January 27, 2026 with no evidence taken.

Maple Circle Marblehead LLC seeks a Special Permit or Variance to divide 9 Maple Circle into two building lots, each with dimensional non-conformities, and to construct a new single-family dwelling on the newly created Lot 2. The application was continued from March 24, 2026 with no evidence yet taken.

Nathaniel Walton seeks a Special Permit to demolish an existing non-conforming single-family home at 340 Ocean Avenue and replace it with a new 2.5-story single-family residence on the same non-conforming lot in the Expanded Single Residence District. The rebuilt home will not meet lot area requirements and will encroach into the side and rear yard setbacks.

Stephanie Brocoum seeks Special Permit(s) on court-ordered remand to construct a rear addition to an existing non-conforming two-story commercial building at 132 Washington Street and convert the second floor from office to residential use, creating a mixed-use (commercial and residential) property in the Unrestricted District. The rear addition will encroach on the side yard setback.

stories.name: Residential Addition, Deck, and Stormwater Work — 18 May Street

events.summary: Monica, Dale, and Oe Onusseit are seeking Conservation Commission approval (file 40-1609) for a residential addition, deck with stairs, landscaping, and stormwater mitigation and management at 18 May Street. The project is within or adjacent to a wetland resource area, requiring ConCom review.

stories.name: Soil Testing and Remediation at Lighthouse Point — Chandler Hovey Park
stories.address: Chandler Hovey Park / Lighthouse Point, Marblehead, MA

contacts.name: Town of Marblehead – Department of Public Works

events.summary: The Town of Marblehead is before the Conservation Commission (file 40-1605) for a public hearing on soil testing and environmental remediation at Lighthouse Point within Chandler Hovey Park. The United States Coast Guard is listed as a named party alongside the Town, suggesting federal involvement in or responsibility for the environmental work at this coastal public-park site.

Accessory dwelling unit application at 6 Broadmere Way, continued from both March 10, 2026 and April 14, 2026 with evidence previously taken. Applicant is Richard Spenceley/OTR Realty; the ADU constitutes a new residential unit.

Ruthy LLC seeks a Special Permit for a new addition to a pre-existing non-conforming mixed-use building in the B1 District, continued from February 24, 2026 with no evidence yet taken. The proposal would create deficiencies in lot area, open area, and parking, exceed height limits, and exceed the 10% expansion cap for non-conforming buildings.

237 Washington Street LLC seeks a Special Permit to convert two existing commercial units into a converted dwelling with one residential unit on the second floor in the Business Residential District. The proposal would result in deficiencies in lot area, frontage, width, side yard setback, open area, and parking.

Riptide Holdings LLC seeks a Special Permit to convert an existing restaurant to a mixed commercial/residential use, adding two dwelling units on the second floor, in the B1 and Business Residential Districts. The proposal would result in deficiencies in lot area, frontage, width, side yard setback, open area, and parking.

stories.name: FY27 Budget Override and FY27-29 Financial Management Plan

events.summary: Select Board is holding a Budget Override Discussion and reviewing a Memorandum of Understanding establishing an FY27 Override Framework and a FY27-29 Financial Management Plan, with a possible vote. No override dollar amount is stated in the agenda.

stories.name: Village Street Bridge Design and Permitting — Change Order No. 3 (Contract 2023-003)

events.summary: Select Board is scheduled to vote on Change Order No. 3 under Contract 2023-003 for the Village Street Bridge design and permitting engagement. No dollar value or description of the scope change is provided in the agenda.

Jennifer Smith and Richard Katz seek a special permit to unmerge 1 and 3 Devereux Street, restoring them as two separate single-family dwelling lots on pre-existing nonconforming lots in the Single Residence District. Relief is required for a substandard side yard setback at 1 Devereux and substandard lot area and frontage at 3 Devereux.

Debbie Williams seeks a special permit to demolish the existing single-family dwelling at 21 Preston Beach Road and construct a new single-family dwelling on the same pre-existing nonconforming lot in the Single Residence District. The project requires relief from substandard lot area, frontage, lot width, rear and side yard setbacks, and parking.

job_contact.org: Town of Marblehead – Department of Public Works
